summary: Color-graded recap video set to a music bed with spoken voiceover, posted by the DHS official. It documents a visit to Miami, Florida. Footage shows a small Coast Guard interceptor boat (hull number 36010) flying a small American flag and speeding across harbor water past a glass port building, then a conference-room scene with three uniformed men seated at a table in front of a US flag and a service flag with printed nameplates, and repeated shots of a bearded man in a dark suit with a clip-on microphone speaking to camera outdoors in front of a glass-walled building. Burned-in white caption text tracks the spoken narration about training, drug interdictions, and cooperation between federal and local law enforcement. The audio is spoken word over music.

script.scene: A gray Coast Guard interceptor boat marked 36010, flying a small US flag, speeds across choppy harbor water past a multi-story glass port building. White caption: 'GET TO SEE HOW THEY'.

Interior conference room: three men seated behind a wooden table, one in a dark Coast Guard uniform, one in a gray polo shirt, one in a tan uniform with a shoulder patch. A US flag and a service flag stand behind them; printed nameplates sit on the table. White caption: 'INTERDICTIONS'.
A bearded man in a navy suit and light blue tie with a clip-on microphone speaks to camera outdoors in front of a glass-walled building. White caption: 'OTHER CITIES'.
The same man continues speaking to camera with his hands open. White caption: 'PROTECT OUR'.
The same man, clasped hands, finishing his remarks to camera. White caption: 'PRIVILEGE BEING DOWN THERE'.

notable_text: GET TO SEE HOW THEY; INTERDICTIONS; OTHER CITIES; PROTECT OUR; PRIVILEGE BEING DOWN THERE
